# openai_project_spend_alerts (Data Source)

List project spend alerts.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_project_spend_alerts" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) project id

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
- `spend_alerts` (Attributes List) Project spend alerts returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spend_alerts))

<a id="nestedatt--spend_alerts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spend_alerts`

Read-Only:

- `currency` (String) currency
- `id` (String) id
- `interval` (String) interval
- `notification_channel_recipients` (List of String) notification channel recipients
- `notification_channel_subject_prefix` (String) notification channel subject prefix
- `notification_channel_type` (String) notification channel type
- `threshold_amount` (Number) threshold amount
